title: A Hand-Me-Down.
content:
Said Sue to her suitor:
        "You'll get a new suit, or
     I'll sue for a suitor to suit."
        "Why Sue," said her suitor
     Who tried hard to suit her,
        "Your suitor is suited to suit."
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Edwin C. Ranck delivers a powerful performance in "A Hand-Me-Down."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
